criteria.outcome: A user can create a task with a title and see it appear in the task list
A user can mark a task as complete and it moves to the done column
A user can filter the task list by status and only matching tasks are shown
A user can create a project and see it in the project list
A manager can see each team member's assigned hours, capacity, utilization, and overload risk
A manager can filter utilization by team member and reporting period
A dashboard shows task throughput, overdue work, completion rate, and workload health against KPI targets
Role-based access separates admin, manager, team-member, and viewer capabilities
